name: agentic-workflow-guard-mcp-resources
description: MCP-style resource descriptors for Agentic Workflow Guard rules, benchmarks, skills, and remediation playbooks.

resources.name: benchmark-fixtures
resources.title: Agentic Workflow Guard Benchmark Fixtures
resources.description: Expected findings for vulnerable and safe workflow fixtures.

resources.name: auditor-skill
resources.title: Agentic Workflow Guard Auditor Skill
resources.description: Portable SKILL.md workflow for auditing AI automation risks.

resources.name: github-actions-playbook
resources.title: GitHub Actions Remediation Playbook
resources.description: How to reduce agent prompt injection and write-permission risks in GitHub Actions.

resources.name: n8n-playbook
resources.title: n8n Remediation Playbook
resources.description: How to guard n8n external trigger -> AI node -> side-effect paths.

resources.name: mcp-playbook
resources.title: MCP Tool Governance Playbook
resources.description: How to scope MCP filesystem, shell, browser, GitHub, and infrastructure tools.

resources.name: low-code-playbook
resources.title: Low-Code AI Workflow Remediation Playbook
resources.description: How to guard Activepieces, Zapier, Make, Pipedream, Node-RED, and Airflow AI workflows.

resources.name: browser-automation-playbook
resources.title: Browser Automation Remediation Playbook
resources.description: How to guard browser-use, Skyvern, Playwright, and Puppeteer AI browser side effects.
